prescription: put 10-25 lbs of plates on your back if very easy

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Ups/Raises- pause the top and down slow
prescription: pause the top and down slow, don't quite go all the way down, keep the back flat and arched at the top, don't bring your knees above the waste , when you start to lift the knees bend them and then straighten the legs back out on the way down.
